class_variables.name: authorizenet.constants.constants.headers
documentation:
Following constants are defined and used in the ARBSubscriptionStatusController
Used to remove the "Status" element, that has been deprecated
However, since the server response still contains it, we have to remove it
before de-serialization

class_variables.name: authorizenet.constants.constants.response_encoding
documentation: note section of subscription status response

All the constants are defined here
Define all your constants instead of using magic numbers in the
code.

methods.name: authorizenet.apicontrollersbase.APIOperationBaseInterface.execute
documentation:
Makes a http-post call. 
Uses request xml and response class type to check that the response was of correct type

methods.name: authorizenet.apicontrollersbase.APIOperationBaseInterface.getresultcode
documentation: Returns the result code from the response

methods.name: authorizenet.apicontrollersbase.APIOperationBaseInterface.getmessagetype
documentation: Returns the message type enum from the response

methods.name: authorizenet.apicontrollersbase.APIOperationBaseInterface.afterexecute
documentation: Returns the message received from binding after processing request

functions.name: authorizenet.apicontractsv1.CreateFromDocument
documentation:
Parse the given XML and use the document element to create a
Python instance.

@param xml_text An XML document.  This should be data (Python 2
str or Python 3 bytes), or a text (Python 2 unicode or Python 3
str) in the L{pyxb._InputEncoding} encoding.

@keyword fallback_namespace An absent L{pyxb.Namespace} instance
to use for unqualified names when there is no default namespace in
scope.  If unspecified or C{None}, the namespace of the module
containing this function will be used, if it is an absent
namespace.

@keyword location_base: An object to be recorded as the base of all
L{pyxb.utils.utility.Location} instances associated with events and
objects handled by the parser.  You might pass the URI from which
the document was obtained.

@keyword default_namespace An alias for @c fallback_namespace used
in PyXB 1.1.4 through 1.2.6.  It behaved like a default namespace
only for absent namespaces.

functions.name: authorizenet.apicontractsv1.CreateFromDOM
